filename: 01. Haremar Faith Capoeira School - Song of the Fight (Believers Will Be Saved) - FATAL FURY.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 35 - Fatal Fury (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\01. Haremar Faith Capoeira School - Song of the Fight (Believers Will Be Saved) - FATAL FURY.mp3
description: I appreciate that the Fatal Fury pays homage to global music more than Street Fighter ever could, but this track isn't great, nor is the remix.
title: Haremar Faith Capoeira School - Song of the Fight (Believers Will Be Saved)
composers: Hiroshi Matsumoto, Kazuhiro Nishida, Toshikazu Tanaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 35: Fatal Fury

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 35 - Fatal Fury (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\02. The Sea Knows - FATAL FURY.mp3
description: Cool that it's an original track from the original Fatal Fury but those drums are way too loud.
title: The Sea Knows
composers: Hiroshi Matsumoto, Kazuhiro Nishida, Toshikazu Tanaka
contributors: Hiroshi Matsumoto, Kazuhiro Nishida, Toshikazu Tanaka
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 35: Fatal Fury

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 35 - Fatal Fury (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\03. Kurikinton - FATAL FURY 2 .mp3
description: This track is considered to be Terry Bogard's theme. The stage is a train in the American south which is why the track has those train hoot sounds. I think it's alright.
title: Kurikinton
composers: Masahiko Hataya, Toshio Shimizu, Yoshihiko Kitamura
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 35: Fatal Fury

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 35 - Fatal Fury (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\04. Kurikinton - FATAL FURY 2.mp3
description: The original version with all the train SFX included! I think it's a bit hard to listen to.
title: Kurikinton
composers: Masahiko Hataya, Toshio Shimizu, Yoshihiko Kitamura
contributors: Masahiko Hataya, Toshio Shimizu, Yoshihiko Kitamura
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 35: Fatal Fury

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 35 - Fatal Fury (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\05. Kuri Kinton Flavor - KOF XIV.mp3
description: A later game in the series remixed Terry's theme. It's pretty good. A nice mix-up of the theme.
title: Kuri Kinton Flavor
composers: a.k.a. DUGIA♪, Naoki Kita, Rio "88" Hashikawa, Minori Sasaki, Mayuko Hino
contributors: a.k.a. DUGIA♪, Naoki Kita, Rio "88" Hashikawa, Minori Sasaki, Mayuko Hino

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 35 - Fatal Fury (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\16. 11th Street - FATAL FURY WILD AMBITION.mp3

composers: SNK Corporation
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 35: Fatal Fury

composers: SNK Corporation
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 35: Fatal Fury

description: Athena is a 1986 game with what's thought to be one of the first ever female playable characters. In the game she runs around in just a bikini because that's what women are for, right? Anyway SNK made the game and somehow that means that she gets a remix in Ultimate because Terry's in. Wild. I don't think the music is that good.
title: Forest World
composers: SNK Corporation
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 35: Fatal Fury
